modelSearch.title: Model Search
modelSearch.description: Find a creature or gameobject model by tag. Tags are maintained in the creature_model_tags / gameobject_model_tags tables. Select a result to preview it; click to copy its display id.
modelSearch.hubDescription: Find NPC & GameObject models by tag
modelSearch.copied: Copied display id {id} to the clipboard
modelSearch.emptyHint: Type a tag to search for a model
